title: Lead
description: One artificial-turf lead produced by the Lead Scraper. Field names ending in __c mirror Salesforce custom field API names so the record maps cleanly to a Salesforce Lead. Pipeline-only metadata fields do not sync to Salesforce (see docs/SCHEMAS.md).

external_id.description: Stable, content-derived id (hash of Company + Project_Name__c + primary source URL). Maps to a Salesforce External Id field so upserts are idempotent across runs.

location_id.description: Which location this lead was discovered under.

FirstName.description: Point-of-contact first name. Empty string if unknown.

LastName.description: Point-of-contact last name. Empty string if unknown.

Lead_Details__c.description: Project summary: scope, sports, square footage, products needed.

Project_Address__c.description: Project site address. Empty string if unresolved.

Phone.description: Contact phone. Empty string if unknown.

Projected_Start_Date__c.description: Expected start date (free text or ISO). Empty string if unknown.

Title.description: Contact job title. Empty string if unknown.

Email.description: Contact email. Empty string if unknown.

Project_Name__c.description: Label: [Site or facility name] - [compact scope]. 3-8 words. Not a sentence.

source_ids.description: Source ids this lead traces back to. Pipeline metadata; not synced to Salesforce as-is.

source_urls.description: Exact page URL(s) the lead was found on. Pipeline metadata.

confidence.description: Extraction/validation confidence. Below the review threshold routes to human review before Salesforce.

needs_review.description: True if any required field is missing, sport is unconfirmed, or confidence is below threshold.
